message:
ci: Install Playwright browsers before E2E tests

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/d90cf4ae-edc2-4219-ae86-0b0df79b20c8

files.patch:
@@ -34,6 +34,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Run tests
         run: bun test
 
+      - name: Install Playwright browsers
+        run: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
+
       - name: Run E2E tests
         run: bun run test:e2e
